name: Steamed Chicken & Ham with Broccoli Spears
recipeInstructions:
1. Marinating: Combine chopped onions, ginger slices, sherry, and salt in a bowl. Rub the mixture inside and out of the chicken pieces, then place the onion and ginger pieces inside the chicken. Allow to marinate for 1 hour. Repeat the process with the ham.
2. Steaming: Steam the chicken breast-side up for 25-30 minutes until firm but very moist when removed from the steamer. Drain and allow to cool. Chop into bite-size pieces. Carefully remove bones from the chicken. Slice the ham into bite-size pieces matching the chicken pieces.
3. Arrange the cooked meat on a serving platter in an alternating pattern, if possible.
4. Blanching and Stir-frying Vegetable: Wash broccoli and remove tough skin. Cut into spears with flowerets at the tip of each spear. Blanch for 20 seconds in salted water. Heat peanut oil in a wok until it begins to smoke. Stir-fry broccoli until bright but still crisp, then sprinkle with fish sauce and toss briefly.
5. Glazing Sauce: In a saucepan, heat stock and crushed rock sugar, stirring until boiling. Dribble in cornstarch paste to form a light sauce while continuing to stir. Add cooked oil and pour over the meat. Serve.
